name: TorrentHunt 1.6.0-beta
body:
## Watch a torrent on any device on your network

The in-app player now has a **Watch on another device** button. It shows a QR code and a link — open it on a phone, tablet or TV on the same Wi-Fi and the video plays **with seeking**, even for formats the browser normally can't decode (mkv, HEVC, AVI…), because the desktop transcodes to **HLS on the fly** (two adaptive quality levels).

- Browser-friendly files (mp4/webm) stream directly with native seeking and near-zero CPU.
- No app to install on the other device, no cloud — served straight from your PC over the LAN, behind a single-use access token.

### Fixed
- Share links now clearly explain when a movie can't preview in the browser (e.g. mkv/HEVC) instead of silently failing — pointing you to Download or to **Watch on another device** on the same Wi-Fi.

> Note: casting works best on **completed** downloads (seeking into not-yet-downloaded parts can glitch). First cast may trigger a Windows Firewall prompt — allow it.

Full changelog: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/NIHILcoder/TorrentHunt/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

---

**Installer:** `TorrentHunt-Setup-1.6.0-beta.exe`  
**SHA-256:** `1461381007F2B3B2B2AC655A7CD719BF420B8673AD155A827B38108360740FC4`
